DAYS
DEFINED THE ONES OF MINIMUM 24 CONSECUTIVE STEAMING HOURS RUNNING FROM NOON
TO
NOON IN OPEN AND DEEP SEA, IN WINDS UP TO AND INCLUDING BEAUFORT 4 (I.E UP
TO 16
KTS) AND/OR SEA STATE 3 DEFINED UP TO 1.25M SIGNIFICANT COMBINED WAVE
HEIGHT,
WITH NO NEGATIVE INFLUENCE BY SWELL/ NO ADVERSE CURRENTS. FAVORABLE CURRENTS
ARE
NOT TO BE TAKEN INTO ACCOUNT AND NOT ANY DEDUCTION IS ALLOWED DUE TO CURRENT
FACTOR IN THE VESSEL\'S AVERAGE SPEED. EXTRAPOLATION AS PER ENGLISH LAW AND
FROM
"GOOD WEATHER" PERFORMANCE FOR "BAD WEATHER" PERIODS IS NOT ALLOWED.
THE ONLY ACCEPTED , RECOGINZED AND APPLIED METHOD IN ASSESSING THE VESSEL\'S
PERFORMANCE IS THE GOOD WEATHER METHODOLOGY WHILE ANY OTHER
ALTERNATIVE
SUCH AS THE ALL WEATHER ASSESSMENT, WE4Sea, RGM GURU METHOD IS TO BE
EXPRESSLY EXCUDED FOR ANY CLAIM ARISING
HOWSOEVER
AND WHATSOEVER.
